title: Process Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger process design foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Process Design Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Process Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good process design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Process Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
